title: putranjivaceae
intro: The Putranjivaceae rank refers to a family of flowering plants, commonly known as the putranjiva family. This family is a group of plants characterized by their unique characteristics and shared ancestry. The Putranjivaceae family consists of about 20 species spread across various regions, primarily in tropical and subtropical areas. The plants within this family are often woody shrubs or small trees, known for their distinctive leaves and flowers.
